title: After the Tenno Sho (Spring): Even After Losing

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen takes the spring shield! She's
proven herself a worthy member of her
prestigious family!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(I didn't even come close! How is she so much
better than me?!)

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
That's McQueen for you! She took all that
pressure in stride and realized the Mejiro family's
ambitions!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
But what about Ryan? I suppose this means
McQueen's going to be the one to guide the
Mejiro family forward...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I may have lost today, but next time, the glory's
mine!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
McQueen isn't the only runner in the Mejiro
family! And at the Takarazuka Kinen, I, Mejiro
Ryan, will show you that I'm not to be ignored!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
...Yeah! That's right! I'll always be rooting for you,
Ryan!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(And here I was feeling all sorry for myself... I
didn't even think about my fans.)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(But Ryan's different. She heard her fans' voices
and put them at ease right away.)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...Now that's someone who's lived shouldering
expectations. That's what separates me and her...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I've made up my mind! At the Takarazuka Kinen,
that's gonna be me!
